title: DamageStatisticsMod
description: A mod designed to help beginner/intermediate players learn the game, and to help train advanced players.
body:
DamageStatistics was designed to help teach beginner / intermediate players learn how to pvp, and to help train more advanced players.

Features: 

Spacing and jump reset trackers to help learn timings

Sprint hit, sweep hit, crit counter to help you see what you need to balance out in your playstyle, whether you are sweep hitting too much or not critting enough.

Shield break counter and smash counter - the shield break is useful for axe pvp to see how often you use this mechanic - the smash counter is just a cool little tracker for mace pvp.

Totem pop counter: currently a work in progress, only works with the users totems.

armor hud: a simple clean design for armor hud

Accuracy tracker: Shows you how good your aim is, and if you need to improve or not.

Combo Counter: Counts how many hits you get before getting hit back

Refill Coach: Helps you track your refill speed in PotPvP

GUI: You can press K to open the GUI and click and drag different elements to move them around.

Disclaimer: THIS MOD DOES NOT GIVE YOU ANY ADVANTAGE OVER OTHER PLAYERS. All it does is train you in the core mechanics of the game and give you an overview on what you could improve.


It's currently in testing and any feedback would be greatly appreciated.


Feel free to add me on discord with any suggestions. My discord is aidreth

- Lounmala
